sections.locator: Page 4 / Section 3.2 Setup and Golden-Part Verification
sections.heading: Leak Test Setup
sections.text: Use M220, fixture FX-002 and released LeakTestProgram V3.4. Verify the master leak and golden sample before production.

sections.heading: Control Method and Equipment
sections.text: Apply 500 ± 5 kPa test pressure, stabilize for 3.0 seconds and measure for 5.0 seconds. The method range is 0.00–0.50 sccm with 0.01 sccm resolution.

sections.heading: Abnormal Result Handling
sections.text: A result can be measurable but nonconforming. Product acceptance uses the effective product specification; abnormal results use the reaction plan.
